summary: Iteration 67: Verified Divergence Guard and soccer prediction improvements. All 8 pytest tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with no basketball references. Backtest results show 2/4 picks flipped correctly (D. Sanderson, B. Whiteman), 1 correctly flagged as COIN FLIP (L. Ayling), and 1 had an error (A. Morris).

minor.issue: A. Morris backtest returned error (null new_rec) - likely due to missing player data in API-Sports

critical_code_review_comments: Divergence Guard code verified at lines 2154-2179 in predict.py - triggers when AI vs Bayesian gap exceeds 30%, overrides to 80-90% Bayesian weight
Game Tempo Estimation verified at lines 843-914 - calculates expected total goals, classifies tempo (high/low/normal), applies tempoMultiplier
Favorite Dampening verified at lines 917-942 - applies to pass props when team odds < 1.60
Double-dip fix verified - possession scaling removed from duplicate application
Backtest results: 2/4 picks flipped correctly (D. Sanderson: over→under, B. Whiteman: over→under), 1 correctly flagged as COIN FLIP (L. Ayling), 1 error (A. Morris)
No basketball references found in any frontend tab (SCAN, TRACKING, INTEL, PROFILE)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tabs load, no errors, no basketball references)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified 5 new prediction improvement systems: (1) Game Tempo Estimation - calculates expected total goals, classifies tempo, applies tempoMultiplier. (2) Heavy Favorite Dampening - when team odds < 1.60, applies dampeningFactor to OVER pass predictions. (3) Possession Contradiction Warning - returns POSSESSION_CONTRADICTION type when saving same-direction pass props for opposing teams. (4) Divergence Guard - when AI vs Bayesian gap exceeds 30%, overrides to 80-90% Bayesian weight. (5) Double-dip fix - removed duplicate possession scaling. Backtest verified 2/4 picks flip correctly, 1 correctly flagged as COIN FLIP. The /api/predict endpoint requires real API-Sports player/team IDs to produce a full response.

divergence_guard.logging: [DIVERGENCE GUARD] {gap}% gap — AI={ai_proj} vs Bayes={bayesian_posterior}. Overriding to {bayes_weight}% Bayesian weight

double_dip_fix.description: Removed duplicate possession scaling that was being applied twice

no_basketball_references.frontend_tabs: All 4 tabs (SCAN, TRACKING, INTEL, PROFILE) verified clean
